summary: Completed testing of Team Applications, Growth Partners, and Reports Support Tab features. All tabs (Onboarding, Active, Discontinued) render correctly. Step modals open when clicking onboarding step buttons. Reports modal works for active team members. Support tab shows ticket insights matching API response.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Team Applications and Growth Partners pages now have merged onboarding functionality with tabs for Onboarding, Active, and Discontinued. Reports page has Support tab with insights from /admin/reports/support-insights endpoint. Sidebar no longer has separate GP Onboarding or Team Onboarding links.

team_applications_tabs.details: All 8 tabs render correctly: New(7), Contacted(0), Interview(0), Hired(7), Onboarding(2), Active(2), Discontinued(3), Archived(0)

onboarding_step_buttons.details: Step buttons (Personal Info, Bank Details, Contract, Training) are clickable and open modal for incomplete steps

activate_button.details: Activate button only appears for members with 4/4 steps completed (verified in code, no members currently have 4/4 in onboarding status)

reports_modal_active_members.details: Reports button opens modal showing team member metrics (Total Leads, Conversions, Demos, Tickets, Students/Schools breakdown)

reports_support_tab.details: Support tab shows ticket insights: Total Tickets, Pending, Resolution Rate, Tickets by Category/Priority/Source, Status Distribution, Team Performance

support_api_data_matching.details: Frontend displays data matching API response: query_types, priority_breakdown, status_breakdown all render correctly

growth_partners_tabs.details: All 8 tabs work: New Leads(9), Contacted(1), In Discussion(0), Converted(1), Onboarding(8), Active Partners(1), Discontinued(1), Archived(1)

sidebar_navigation.details: No separate GP Onboarding or Team Onboarding links in sidebar - correctly merged into main pages
